rejection_reason: compliance + structure: email_require_legal_footer + email_require_personalization — email is missing both the required CAN-SPAM legal footer AND any personalization token. Two separate violations must both be fixed before this email can be sent.
text:
Subject: A faster way to onboard your team

Hi there,

I came across your company and thought FlowAI could be a great fit for your team.

FlowAI saves professionals an average of 2 hours per day by automating the repetitive workflows that slow teams down.

We work with fast-growing companies in SaaS, fintech, and professional services.

Would a quick 15-minute call be worth it to explore whether FlowAI could help?
